title: Experimental Data-Driven Resilience Curve Prototype
method: Candidate B: dominant sustained threshold drop
data_notes: Experimental v0 method; not a replacement for the stable deployed dashboard score.
Tier 3 metrics are observed operational performance labels from NPMRDS speed curves.
Tier 1/2 fields are predictor/context layers for future modeling.
Delay burden uses NPMRDS2 2025 profile demand as a weighting field, not observed event-day volume.
